name: Spumone-brocato's
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Heavy cream, whipped to stiff peaks
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is from the famous Italian dessert establishment Mid-City and French Quarter, New Orleans. Place a 2-1/2 quart ice cream mold in the freezer.
1. In a large bowl, beat the pistachio ice cream with an electric mixer until smooth but not melted.
2. Evenly spread the pistachio ice cream in the chilled mold. Freeze until firm.
3. In another bowl, beat the strawberry ice cream with an electric mixer until smooth but not melted.
4. Spread the strawberry ice cream over the pistachio ice cream. Freeze until firm.
5. Mix the chopped cherries into the whipped cream and spread as the final layer in the mold. Freeze until firm.
6. Serves 8-10.
